[DQC.US.0001.9366] The member BridgeLoanMember is inappropriately used on the axis BusinessAcquisitionAxis. The only members allowed on this axis are extension members defined by the filer and the members us-gaap:BusinessAcquisitionAcquireeDomain, us-gaap:SeriesOfIndividuallyImmaterialBusinessAcquisitionsMember. There are no facts associated with this member and axis.
